facilities.hostel: Hostel facility available for both boys and girls. Fee is approximately 1,00,000 per year.
facilities.library: Library is open from 9 AM to 4 PM with more than 50,000 books available.
facilities.sports: Cricket, Football, Volleyball, Kabaddi, Athletics, Carrom, Chess
facilities.buses: College buses start at 7:00 AM from major city points.
facilities.wifi: High speed WiFi available across entire campus.
facilities.canteen: Spacious canteen with affordable food available all day.
facilities.medical: On-campus medical room with first aid facility.

placements.info: Top companies visit our campus every year.
